user.title: SunSpec Emulator Setup
user.description: Emulate a SunSpec-compatible PV inverter + meter via Modbus TCP.

data_description.grid_entity: Sensor measuring grid power in Watts (positive = import, negative = export). E.g. Shelly 3EM total power.
data_description.pv_entity: Sensor measuring PV production in Watts (positive = generation). E.g. Hoymiles power output.
data_description.modbus_port: Port 502 is standard but requires root/admin.
data_description.modbus_unit_id: Modbus slave address. Most devices expect 1.

error.port_in_use: This port is already used by another SunSpec Emulator instance.
